notes:
What's new in V3.1.2:
• ✂️ Smarter Story Cutter — improved editorial judgment, stronger hook detection, and tighter pacing logic for better rough cuts
• 📋 Creative Briefs — bring producer notes from ChatGPT or Google Docs, or use /creative brief to build one inside CVP. Your tone and intent carry through the whole session automatically
• 🧠 Better instruction following — CVP holds your focus, style, and constraints more reliably across multi-turn conversations
• 🐛 More accurate soundbites — fixed a bug clipping the last word(s) off soundbites; cuts now land on their natural endpoints
• ⚡ It's faster — less waiting, more editing
